meaning: 茨维考[德意志民主共和国南部城市]
examples: Just north of Zwickau, it employs 5, 600 people and last year turned out around 240, 000 Passats and Golfs.
Despite the recent job losses, Sachsenring still employs 1, 100 people in Zwickau, compared with the 285 it took on in 1993.
The firm reckons that it supports 36, 000 jobs at suppliers in eastern Germany, some at factories next to the Zwickau plant.
